reviews.review_description: Super cool idea with the leaders board, but please fix the cant hit average over 999 that takes away from doing your best.

reviews.review_title: Please give me my leader board
reviews.review_description: i’ve been robbed twice. I had 90 home runs  a 28 home run streak and a 1550 flight distance. PLEASE PUT ME ON THE WALL OF CHAMPIONS (i also have proof)

I love this game and play it all the time, It’s very buggy sometimes and most of my runs don’t go on the weekly leaderboard a lot of the time. I was wondering if this game is ever going to get an update that will fix some of the issues in the game. Anyway it is very fun and competitive.
Get it so good

Ok so I have had several games that were over the top player on the leader board so it never shows up though. Why is that. Do you have to submit it somehow? Other than that I wish you could at least see the balls . Most can’t be seen when you hit it. Also is there a way to speed up the pitching?

https://www.oculus.com/referrals/link/shaundashepp/

If you have not got a oculus yet but plan on it use this code and you will get $30 bucks for free and you can use that money to buy games when you get your oculus. It will also work if you got your headset less then 7 days ago.
It’s really bad game and I do not enjoy it. It is very boring. I wish you could play other positions. ￼
Nice🤯
Would get 5 stars but ive hit 65 home runs twice and had a streak of 17 Homer's and a average flight distance of over 1200 multiple times but doesnt show up on the board

developer_response.body: Thanks for the rating. There is a bug where the stats aren't submitted if your avg flight distance is over 999.

reviews.review_description: good game but I wish you could use two hands instead of one and another thing that would be better is if it was a pitcher instead of the green rectangle and if when you hit the ball a close of you ran and if there were like enemy team but over all good game

developer_response.body: Thanks for the comment. Have you tried wrapping your 2nd hand around the one holding the controller? Then it's almost like holding a bat, but instead of the 2nd hand being above the other, it's wrapped around it.

reviews.review_description: I wish you guys had a miles per hour amount so you could set the miles per hour you want the machine to pitch

developer_response.body: Yes that is something we had considered. I'd like to update the game to allow this but our game file is corrupt. If you read one of other responses we talk more about it. Thanks for your comment.

reviews.review_description: Been playing this game for about a week I already left one review . Me and my buddies bought this game and we've been playing it everyday, bragging who has the most hits. Fighting to be the home run leader. The game needs to be updated after every 12 minutes sessions. That way the info on the scoreboard is correct and current. This game is very competitive and very fun if you have a few buddies and you're all going at it to be the top home run hitter. This game counts hits, heights, distances of the balls being hit, how many consecutive home runs you're hitting and the total home run count.

developer_response.body: You're always a winner in our books! But ya, there is a bug where it does what you say, not all the time but I've seen it. Maybe take the last 10 seconds off as a cooldown or something to avoid it. Thanks for the comment and glad you otherwise enjoy the game.

reviews.review_title: I should be on the leader board
reviews.review_description: I had a run with 61 hr’s and an average flight distance of 1000+ which should put me at atleast second and first place in those categories, I wait an hour for the leaderboard to update and it says 45 hr’s and 945 flight didstance someone needs to look at my run that I made around 7:30 EST, and I also had a hr streak of 11 which would put me at third in the board

developer_response.body: Sorry there is a bug which seems to happen where the stats aren't submitted for the session if you have a flight distance 1000+ .  I'd like to update the app at some point but  last UE for VR corrupted my project. I will look into using the new UE5 VR stuff when I get a chance. In the meantime, if you want to still play, just keep your ball flight under 1000. Also, maybe take 10 seconds off at the end of the session. I have heard reports of stats not being submitted if they hit a home run right as the time runs out.

reviews.review_title: What i think about the game
reviews.review_description: This game is poorly made I think that the developer should let you use 2 hands to swing and other people are saying there are very bad leaderboard glitches I thought it was barely fun because it doesn’t feel realistic

I'd like to start this off with saying I've already put a few hours into this game after having it for a couple of days. It is so easy to lose 30+ minutes playing.

It can be frustrating at first but once you get a good system that works for you it is really fun. Not much more to say.

I would like to be able to see my score either during the round or when the round is over. They have a leader board for score but unless you do the equation they give you, and do it right, you can't see your score. I would also prefer if the distance was in feet instead of whatever measurement it is in. If it is in feet maybe change it so that you aren't hitting balls 1,000 feet. The last thing I would like would be for the outfield wall to be an actual rounded wall instead of the straight wall that cuts off the field they currently seem to have. These are just minor nitpicks though.

Game is great, give it a try.
Wish you could play other positions

The game is really good but I wish that they can make stands with fans in the stadium so it isn’t just boring, I also think it would be better if they made the homerun distance realistic because nobody can hit a ball 2200 feet
Very cool game if you like hitting home runs ! My only complaint is the leader board !!!!!! Got quite a few high scores that never showed up on the leader board !!!!!! Very upsetting !!!!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi Johnny,

Thanks for the review. A couple things. One, there is a bug where if your session ends and your average flight>=1000 your scores won't get submitted. Second, only your top score per category will show up. This was done to allow more names to get on the board. Hope that clears things up.

reviews.review_description: It does the job as a baseball sim but there are better ones
I’m a bit taller but the ball goes a little low but still

developer_response.body: Thanks for the comment. You could try moving forward in the batting box (towards the pitching machine) so the ball will be higher when you make contact.
